_about: Illustrative sample matching the paper's headline numbers for RewardHarness (Qwen) on EditReward-Bench + GenAI-Bench. NOTE: scripts/run_benchmark.py writes only the k2/k3/k4 block; genai_bench and average require a separate GenAI-Bench pass and are added here for paper comparison. See OUTPUTS.md for the literal schema.

k2._pair_results_note: Full pair_results array elided from sample; real run_benchmark.py output includes one dict per pair.

genai_bench._note: Paper-headline reference only. scripts/run_benchmark.py does not produce this key — combine with a separate GenAI-Bench evaluation pass.
